message:
Overhaul fcp-cli scaffold generator and correct testing coverage inventory

Major rewrite of the FCP CLI connector scaffold (crates/fcp-cli/src/new/mod.rs):

Validation and workspace integration:
- Replace inline character validation with fcp_core::validate_canonical_id()
- Add find_workspace_root() to locate the nearest Cargo.toml with [workspace]
- Add update_workspace_members() / insert_workspace_member() to auto-register
  new connectors in workspace members list
- Validate empty crate_slug, resolve workspace_root, use absolute base_path

Generated code modernization:
- main.rs: use fcp_sdk::prelude::*, typed request deserialization
  (HandshakeRequest, InvokeRequest, SubscribeRequest, UnsubscribeRequest,
  ShutdownRequest) instead of raw Value, add encode<T: Serialize>() helper,
  add unsubscribe method handling
- lib.rs: simplify raw string delimiter (r"..." instead of r#"..."#)
- connector.rs: implement FcpConnector trait instead of ad-hoc handlers,
  add MANIFEST_TOML/OP_PLACEHOLDER/CAP_PLACEHOLDER/SUPPORTS_STREAMING
  constants, manifest_hash() via SHA-256, typed HandshakeResponse with
  capabilities_granted/session_id/manifest_hash/event_caps, HealthSnapshot
  with uptime, typed InvokeResponse and SubscribeResponse
- manifest.toml: add assert_cmd dev-dep, change idempotency to best_effort,
  reformat network_constraints to TOML section style
- Unit tests: use fcp_sdk::prelude::*, typed base_invoke() helper,
  call trait methods (.invoke()/.configure()) instead of handle_* methods
- E2E tests: use assert_cmd cargo_bin() instead of env! macro

Prechecks hardening:
- Use ConnectorManifest::parse_str() for full FCP validation
- Validate single-zone binding (allowed_sources/targets match home)
- Validate NetworkConstraints per-operation (host_allow/port_allow
  non-empty, deny flags set)
- Check system.exec in forbidden capabilities
- Require #![forbid(unsafe_code)] in both main.rs and lib.rs
- Validate connector ID via validate_connector_id()
- to_pascal_case() now splits on dots in addition to _ and -

Update docs/testing/coverage-inventory.md:
- Correct total test markers from ~3,300 to ~3,600+
- Fix fcp-core count (650 -> 1313), fcp-protocol (128 -> 204)
- Mark fcp-crypto (109 tests), fcp-store (100), fcp-raptorq (88) as
  verified well-tested (previously incorrectly listed as untested)
- Reduce Priority 1 gaps from 10 to 7, Priority 2 from 8 to 6
- Add "Previously Identified as Gaps (Now Verified)" section

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
